## Intent

## Validation

- [ ] Targeted regression tests
- [ ] Full unit suite, or reason it was not run
- [ ] Installer/runtime manifest checks when applicable
- [ ] English and Simplified Chinese surfaces kept aligned when applicable

## Risk and rollback

Describe authority, compatibility, data, security, performance, and rollback impact.
